title: fix: response of containers wait endpoint
body:
The `Error` part of response must be nil if no error occurred.
Before this commit a zero value for the struct was returned.

Signed-off-by: Matej Vasek <mvasek@redhat.com>

comments.body:
> The Error part of response must be nil if no error occurred.

It can be also omitted, but I don't know how to assert that.
Changes LGTM, but it looks like you need a rebase @matejvasek
